---
title: "Citing and Attribution"
format: html

previous:
  href: "User-Evaluating OERs.qmd"
  text: "Evaluating OERs"

next:
  href: "User-quiz.qmd"
  text: "Quiz"
---

For citing and properly attributing OERs you are referencing, use the TASL method:

-   **T**itle
-   **A**uthor
-   **S**ource (link)
-   **L**icence

Example: “Title of Resource” by Author (Year), Source URL, licensed under CC BY 4.0.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: User-quiz.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20users/User-quiz.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
